# 📖 The Index of Spells

**91 spells** across **5 houses**. Generated by the Rite of Transcription — do not edit by hand.

> **Do not read this whole tree into context.** To find a spell, *grep* the per-house catalogues in `_index/` (or `catalog.json`) for a capability or name — grep returns only what matches, so the Book stays light no matter how large it grows.

| House | Spells | Catalogue |
| --- | --- | --- |
| cloudflare | 9 | [`_index/cloudflare.md`](_index/cloudflare.md) |
| google | 30 | [`_index/google.md`](_index/google.md) |
| kotlin | 5 | [`_index/kotlin.md`](_index/kotlin.md) |
| obsidian | 5 | [`_index/obsidian.md`](_index/obsidian.md) |
| openai | 42 | [`_index/openai.md`](_index/openai.md) |
